issues: 'ready' is set in app/api/content-generation/route.ts:88,113 but does NOT exist in either type definition
'processing' exists in lib/types/pipeline.ts but NOT in lib/services/database.ts
'pending_approval' and 'approved' exist in lib/services/database.ts but NOT in lib/types/pipeline.ts
app/api/content/library/route.ts:33 filters for 'approved' — works with DB type but not pipeline type
app/api/pipeline/process-drafts/route.ts:103 sets 'processing' — valid in pipeline type but NOT in DB type
ContentPiece_status.recommendation: Unify to single canonical definition: 'draft' | 'pending_approval' | 'approved' | 'published' | 'processing'. Remove 'ready' (use 'approved' or 'pending_approval' instead). Update lib/types/pipeline.ts to match lib/services/database.ts.

PodcastEpisode_status.description: PodcastEpisode.status has THREE conflicting definitions across the codebase
issues: Three different interfaces named PodcastEpisode with incompatible status values
lib/pipeline-data.ts:303 maps Captivate 'Published' -> 'synthesis' (never uses 'scripting', 'concatenating', 'uploading')
'draft' status (lib/types/pipeline.ts) is never produced or consumed in any code path
No single source of truth for podcast episode lifecycle
PodcastEpisode_status.recommendation: Consolidate into one PodcastEpisode interface with status: 'generating' | 'ready' | 'published' | 'failed'. The pipeline-data.ts granular stages (scripting/synthesis/concatenating/uploading) are never actually set in code — simplify or implement properly.

Topic_status.description: Topic.status defined in types but MISSING from the database schema
issues: lib/services/database.ts Topic has no status field — topics have no tracked lifecycle state in DB
lib/pipeline/topic-manager.ts:20 reads Airtable {Status}='Ready' — external source, not local DB
app/api/admin/seed-database/route.ts:61 seeds with status:'ready' but Topic DB interface has no such field
app/api/topics/approval/route.ts uses 'approval_status' field (not 'status') for topic approval tracking — separate concept
Topic_status.recommendation: Add 'status' field to database.ts Topic interface: 'available' | 'in_use' | 'published' | 'rejected'. Current 'last_used' field partially covers this but does not capture rejection or publication state.

issues: 'changes_requested' is defined but never set or checked anywhere in the codebase
Slack approval response route (app/api/slack/approval-response/route.ts:55) only produces 'approved' or 'rejected'
Approval_status.recommendation: Either implement the 'changes_requested' flow with a corresponding Slack button action, or remove it from the type to reduce confusion.

Integration_check_status.description: Integration status values are inconsistent with SystemService type
issues: 'checking' is used as a transient initial value but not in the SystemService type
'failed' is returned by the API but not in the SystemService type (which has 'outage')
'degraded' and 'outage' from SystemService type are never produced by the route
Integration_check_status.recommendation: Align the integration status type to: 'checking' | 'operational' | 'degraded' | 'failed'. Add 'checking' as a valid type. Replace 'outage' with 'failed' or make 'failed' map to 'outage'.

Video_status.description: Video task status naming is inconsistent between KIE API and internal API
issues: KIE external API returns 'success' but internal tasks use 'completed'
app/api/video/generate/route.ts:87 checks task.status === 'in_progress' to map to 'processing', but tasks are stored as 'processing' (not 'in_progress')
The 'in_progress' check will never be true — likely a bug
Video_status.recommendation: Standardize internal video task status to: 'pending' | 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed'. Remove the dead 'in_progress' branch or implement it correctly.

usage_confirmed: lib/services/pipeline.ts: starts as 'running', pauses to 'paused', completes to 'completed', fails to 'failed'

Worker_status.note: Logic correctly computes status based on current day vs worker schedule days

PipelineItem_status.note: This is only used to render Kanban board status. Maps from Airtable/WP statuses correctly.

ContentGeneration_status.description: External content generation task status, consistent

Apify_status.description: External API statuses, UPPERCASE convention — consistent
Apify_status.note: These mirror the Apify API response format. Convention difference (uppercase) is intentional.

ElevenLabs_status.description: External API response status, consistent within its use

InventoryItem_status.description: WordPress post lifecycle for inventory display, consistent

SystemService_status.description: Service health status (see Integration_check_status for discrepancy)

PlatformStatus.description: Per-platform publish status for podcast episodes, consistent

wordpress_status_note.description: WordPress 'publish' status has multiple defensive variants in code
locations: lib/pipeline-data.ts:168 — checks all three variants from Airtable
lib/pipeline-data.ts:203 — checks post.status === 'publish' (correct WP API value)
wordpress_status_note.note: WordPress REST API returns 'publish' (not 'published'). The extra 'published'/'Published' checks are defensive guards for Airtable data which uses different casing.

dead_status_values.used_in: app/api/video/generate/route.ts:87 (dead branch — tasks are stored as 'processing', not 'in_progress')

recommended_fixes.title: Unify ContentPiece.status
recommended_fixes.action: Update lib/types/pipeline.ts ContentPiece.status to match lib/services/database.ts: 'draft' | 'pending_approval' | 'approved' | 'published' | 'processing'. Replace 'ready' usage in app/api/content-generation/route.ts with 'pending_approval'.

recommended_fixes.title: Unify PodcastEpisode.status
recommended_fixes.action: Create single PodcastEpisode interface. Use 'generating' | 'ready' | 'published' | 'failed'. Update lib/pipeline-data.ts, lib/types/pipeline.ts to align with lib/services/podcast-producer.ts definition.

recommended_fixes.title: Add status to Topic DB interface
recommended_fixes.action: Add 'status' field to Topic interface in lib/services/database.ts: 'available' | 'in_use' | 'published' | 'rejected'. Update seed script and topic creation logic.

recommended_fixes.title: Fix dead video 'in_progress' branch
recommended_fixes.action: In app/api/video/generate/route.ts:87, change check from task.status === 'in_progress' to task.status === 'processing' to match the actual stored value.

recommended_fixes.title: Align SystemService/Integration status
recommended_fixes.action: Update SystemService.status type in lib/pipeline-data.ts to: 'checking' | 'operational' | 'degraded' | 'failed'. Or update integration route to use 'outage' consistently with SystemService type.

recommended_fixes.title: Implement or remove 'changes_requested' approval status
recommended_fixes.action: Either add a 'Request Changes' Slack button that sets status to 'changes_requested' with a feedback flow, or remove the status from the Approval type definition.
